quality.rationale: 结合热力学第一定律与绝热指数定义，多步代数推导相对论流声速表达式

origin.question:
Problem 5.23. The velocity of sound in a fluid is $\left.\mathbf{v}_{\mathbf{s}}^{2} =  rac{\partial \mathbf{p}}{\partial ho}ight|_{\mathbf{s}} = 	ext{constant}$ . Show that $\mathbf{v}_{\mathbf{s}}^{2} = \Gamma_{1} \mathbf{p} / (ho + \mathbf{p})$ where $\Gamma_{1}$ is the adiabatic index
$$
\Gamma_{1} = \partial \log p / \partial \log n |_{s = c o n s t a n t}.
$$
origin.solution:
Solution 5.23. From the first law of thermodynamics (see Problem 5.19)
with $\mathbf{ds} = 0$ we have
$$
\mathrm {d} \mathbf {n} / \mathrm {d} \rho = \mathbf {n} / ( \rho + \mathbf {P} ) .
$$
Now we use the definition of $\Gamma_{1}$ and the expression for $\mathbf{v}_{\mathbf{s}}^{2}$ from Problem 5.21:
$$
\frac {{\bf v}_{\mathrm {s}}^{2}} {\Gamma_{1}} = \frac {\mathrm {d P / d} \rho} {( \mathrm {n d P} ) / ( \mathrm {P d n} )} = \frac {\mathrm {\bf P}} {\mathrm {\bf n}} \frac {\mathrm {d n}} {\mathrm {d}\rho} = \frac {\mathrm {\bf P}} {\rho + \mathrm {\bf P}} .
$$
